customer_msg: I tried to reset my password five times now, and I never receive the recovery link in my inbox. I checked my spam folder and verified my email address, but nothing is showing up. This is preventing me from accessing my account entirely.

I would like to kindly request a refund for the item I received yesterday as it arrived damaged. It is a beautiful product, but unfortunately, the screen is cracked and won't turn on. Thank you for your help in resolving this matter.

I AM ABSOLUTELY DONE WITH YOUR INCOMPETENT SERVICE! YOU HAVE CHARGED MY CREDIT CARD THREE TIMES THIS MONTH FOR A BUGGY PLATFORM THAT NEVER EVEN LOADS. REFUND EVERY SINGLE CENT IMMEDIATELY OR I AM FILING A DISPUTE WITH MY BANK AND TELLING EVERYONE I KNOW TO AVOID YOU CLOWNS!

My package was marked as delivered two days ago, but nothing has arrived at my doorstep. I have checked with my neighbors and they haven't seen it either. Could you please help me locate where this was dropped off?

I noticed that you charged me for international shipping, but I live in the same state as your distribution center. Can you explain why the shipping fee was so high for a local delivery? I would appreciate a partial refund for the overcharge.

I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase because the software is not compatible with my operating system. I tried following the installation guide, but it simply crashes upon startup every time. Please let me know the steps to process this return.

YOUR SOFTWARE IS ABSOLUTELY PATHETIC AND COMPLETELY BROKEN! I HAVE TRIED TO ACCESS MY DASHBOARD THREE TIMES TODAY AND IT JUST CRASHES EVERY SINGLE TIME. FIX THIS USELESS BUG IMMEDIATELY BEFORE I CANCEL MY ENTIRE SUBSCRIPTION AND DEMAND A FULL REFUND FOR YOUR INCOMPETENCE!

I am writing to kindly request a full refund for my annual subscription, which I purchased exactly seven months ago. Although I understand this falls outside of your standard 30-day window, I have barely used the service and would truly appreciate an exception to your policy.

I see a strange error code 'ERR_502' popping up whenever I try to update my billing information. I am not sure what this means or if my payment details are actually being saved. Could you please clarify what is going on here?

I am so sorry to bother you, but I was wondering if you could provide a signature upon delivery for my order? It contains some expensive electronics and I want to make sure it doesn't get left unattended on my porch.

I accidentally signed up for the wrong tier and would like to downgrade my plan to the basic version. Can you adjust my billing to reflect the cheaper price for the current month? I would appreciate your help with this mistake.

I am confused because the subscription page says I have the Premium plan, but I cannot access any of the advanced features. The buttons for these tools are grayed out even though I paid for my renewal yesterday. Could you help me understand why this is happening?

Your mobile app keeps crashing every time I try to add an item to my shopping cart. This is the third time today, and it is incredibly annoying because I am trying to finish my purchase before the sale ends. Please fix this immediately.

I noticed that your software lacks the API integration we need for our new shipping provider. I really enjoy the interface, but this missing functionality is a dealbreaker for our workflow. Unless you have a timeline for this feature, I'll have to cancel my plan next week.

I am trying to export my monthly analytics report, but the PDF download button does nothing when I click it. I have tried refreshing the page and using a different browser, but the issue persists. Could you please look into this?

The mobile app is virtually unusable because it loads a blank white screen every time I try to view my dashboard. I rely on mobile access for my business travel, and this bug makes your service useless to me. Please fix this or I am cancelling my subscription.

This is unacceptable! I canceled my account three months ago and yet I am still receiving monthly charges on my bank statement. Stop taking money from my account immediately and refund the unauthorized transactions.

I have been waiting for my refund for three weeks now despite your team confirming it was processed on the 10th. This is completely unacceptable and I am tired of checking my bank statement daily to see nothing. Where is my money?

I am absolutely appalled that my refund of $149.99 still hasn't hit my bank account despite your email claiming it was processed ten days ago. I have checked my statement three times and there is absolutely no record of this transaction being reversed. Fix this immediately or I will be forced to dispute the charge with my credit card company.

I would like to switch from the monthly billing plan to the annual plan to take advantage of the discount. Could you help me make this change for my next billing cycle? Let me know if there is anything I need to do on my end.

I am absolutely livid that you are refusing to refund my order when the package was stolen from my porch. Your shipping carrier left it in an unsafe location, and I shouldn't be the one paying for your poor logistics. Give me my money back right now.

I am writing to check the status of my order placed last Tuesday. It still shows as processing on my account page, so I was wondering if you could provide an updated shipping estimate. Thank you for your assistance.

I have been a loyal annual subscriber for the past six months, but my financial situation has changed and I can no longer afford the service. Would it be possible to cancel my plan today and receive a prorated refund for the remaining six months? I really enjoy the platform, but this is the only way I can stay current with my expenses.

I accidentally purchased the annual subscription instead of the monthly one because the checkout page was very unclear. I have no need for a full year of access right now. Could you please downgrade my plan and refund the difference?

I am beyond frustrated that your software keeps crashing every time I try to export my monthly reports. I’ve lost three hours of work today alone because of these errors. If this isn't resolved immediately, I will be taking my business to your competitor.

I was charged for a renewal even though I cancelled my account before the deadline. I have a confirmation email proving my cancellation, yet you took the funds anyway. I demand an immediate refund for this unauthorized charge.
I noticed that I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Could you please look into this and process a refund for the extra charge? I have attached the receipts for both transactions.

Your customer support team has ignored my tickets for over a week regarding the billing discrepancy on my last invoice. This is unacceptable service for a premium subscription. I am ready to initiate a chargeback and delete my account if I don't hear back by end of day.
I received an email saying my refund was issued to a card that I cancelled months ago. I do not have access to that account anymore. How can we redirect this payment to my current debit card?

I am absolutely appalled that my order still hasn't arrived, especially since your tracking system has been showing 'Delivered' for three days now. I have checked my front porch, my mailbox, and with every single neighbor, and there is nothing here. Do not try to tell me it was delivered when I am staring at an empty doorstep; I demand you send a replacement immediately.

My order arrived today, but it seems that part of my items are missing from the shipment. The packing slip says everything is included, but the box was definitely smaller than expected. Could you please look into this?

I bought the wrong version of your software by mistake and realized it immediately after the transaction. I haven't even downloaded or activated the license keys yet. Can I return this for a refund so I can purchase the correct edition?

Hello, thank you for your help. I found a small bug where the character count on the feedback form stops working after I type more than 200 words. It is not a major issue, but I thought you might want to know about it for your next update.

I am looking for a refund on my subscription since I have barely used the platform in the last six months. I understand your policy, but I was hoping for a partial refund as a goodwill gesture. I hope you can consider this request.

We have decided to move our operations to an in-house solution to save on overhead costs. Please consider this email my formal request to terminate our contract at the end of the current billing cycle. Thank you for the support you provided during our time with you.

I specifically paid for overnight shipping because I needed these items for a birthday party this weekend. It has been three days and the tracking information hasn't updated since it left your warehouse. This is unacceptable service.

The search bar on your site is returning completely irrelevant results for basic queries. I searched for 'winter coat' and it showed me kitchen appliances instead. This makes it impossible for me to find the products I want to buy.

I honestly have no idea how to sync my inventory with the new store update you guys pushed yesterday. Everything looks completely different and my sales are currently stalled. I'm considering closing my account if I can't get this figured out by tomorrow.

I just logged in and noticed that all of my saved project templates have vanished from my dashboard. I put a lot of work into those, and I am very worried that they are gone forever. Can you please restore my data?

I AM ABSOLUTELY LIVID THAT YOU HAVE CHARGED MY ACCOUNT TWICE FOR THE SAME BILLING CYCLE! ARE YOU PEOPLE COMPLETELY INCOMPETENT OR JUST TRYING TO STEAL MY MONEY? FIX THIS UNAUTHORIZED TRANSACTION IMMEDIATELY BEFORE I CONTACT MY BANK TO FILE A FRAUD CLAIM!

I just received my order but the shipping box was completely crushed and three of the items inside are broken. I am extremely upset because this was a gift for my daughter. I would like a full refund immediately.

I keep getting automated emails about my account being inactive, but I log in every single day to manage my storefront. It feels like your system is broken and I'm tired of seeing these threatening cancellation warnings. If this keeps happening, I will just cancel for real.
I buy shirt but it no fit good, very bad size. I want money back to me please, no more want this items. How I send back for refund now?
I am looking at my latest invoice and I don't understand why the total is significantly higher than last month. Did you increase the pricing without notifying me? I feel like I'm being overcharged.

Your service promised a 30-day money-back guarantee, but now you are telling me I am ineligible because I used the free trial first. That was not stated anywhere in the fine print. This feels like a bait and switch tactic.

There seems to be an issue with the automated email notifications for my team. We are receiving duplicate alerts for every single task update, which is clogging up our inboxes. Please let me know how we can stop these redundant messages.

I tried to use the promo code SAVE20 at checkout but it didn't apply to my total. I already completed the purchase at the full price, so can you apply the discount retroactively? I was really counting on that savings.

Hi there, I hope you are having a nice day. I have noticed that the dark mode toggle on the website settings page seems to be broken, as it doesn't switch the theme even after saving. Would you mind investigating this when you have a spare moment?

I am absolutely appalled that you have charged my credit card twice for this month's subscription service. I have checked my bank statement thoroughly, and there are two identical transactions pending for the exact same amount. I demand an immediate refund for the extra charge before I escalate this to my financial institution.

Thank you for your service over the past year, but our business needs have shifted and we no longer require this tool. Could you please help me understand the steps required to export our data before we finalize the account closure? I appreciate your assistance in making this transition smooth.

I am trying to download my tax invoices for the past fiscal year but the links in my account dashboard are broken. I need these documents for my accountant as soon as possible. Can you please email them to me directly?
Where is my package? It say delivered yesterday but porch is empty and no box here. Please help finding where delivery go.

I keep getting emails saying my payment failed, but I have plenty of funds in my account. I have tried three different cards now and none of them are being accepted. This is incredibly frustrating because I am losing access to my work files.
Could you please tell me if it is possible to change the delivery address for my current order? I realized after I hit submit that I accidentally used my old home address instead of my current one.
The tracking link I received in my confirmation email leads to a 404 error page. I have tried refreshing it several times but it still isn't working. How am I supposed to track my package?

The courier attempted delivery while I was at work and now they are returning the package to the sender. Is there any way to stop them from sending it back to your warehouse? I would really like to receive these items.

I am having a lot of trouble navigating the dashboard and finding where my settings are located. I feel like I'm wasting more time trying to manage the software than actually running my shop. I am thinking about switching to a simpler service.

My credit card expired last week and I need to update my payment information, but the portal keeps giving me an error. How can I pay my overdue invoice before my account gets suspended? Please let me know what I should do.

Where can I find the option to update my company's VAT number on my billing profile? I need the information to appear correctly on all future invoices for tax purposes. I have looked everywhere but cannot locate the setting.

I have been using your platform for six months, but the recent price hike makes it difficult to justify the cost for my small team. We aren't using enough of the advanced features to warrant this new monthly rate. Please let me know how to proceed with cancelling my subscription.
